name: [Warrior]
description: Through rigorous training, you've honed your body. Your endurance is exceptional, you tire slowly. Every 5 minutes increase stamina. Per level: +0.55 STR, +0.2 DEX, +0.1 INT, +0.15 PER

name: [Berserker]
description: Rage fuels your strikes. Your fury makes you strike 15% faster. Your endurance is exceptional, you tire slowly. Every 5 minutes increase stamina. Per level: +0.75 STR, +0.45 DEX, +0.1 INT, +0.2 PER

name: [Guardian]
description: A living shield, protecting all. Your skin is naturally armored (+4 physical armor). Your endurance is exceptional, you tire slowly. Every 5 minutes increase stamina. Per level: +0.6 STR, +0.15 DEX, +0.15 INT, +0.6 PER

name: [Mage]
description: The arcane flows through you naturally. Vast reserves of mana (+1000 mana, +25% mana regen). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.05 DEX, +0.55 INT, +0.3 PER

name: [Mystic]
description: You channel raw destructive power. Your hands glow with light (15). Immense reserves of mana (+2500 mana, +50% mana regen). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.2 DEX, +0.75 INT, +0.45 PER

name: [Scholar]
description: Knowledge flows to you effortlessly. You read with supernatural speed (+50% reading speed). Master crafter (+6 fabrication, +6 electronics, +6 mechanics, +2 computer, +2 firstaid). 2x crafting speed. Moderate mana (+800 mana, +20% mana regen). Per level: +0.05 STR, +0.15 DEX, +0.8 INT, +0.5 PER

name: [Rogue]
description: Cunning and dexterous. A master of finesse and guile. Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.55 DEX, +0.15 INT, +0.2 PER

name: [Scout]
description: Master tracker and observer. Your senses are razor sharp. Your movements are unnaturally fast (5% faster movement, +1 speed per level). Per level: +0.15 STR, +0.3 DEX, +0.05 INT, +0.5 PER

name: [Acrobat]
description: A blur of graceful motion. Your reflexes are supernatural (+6 dodge bonus). Your movements flow with impossible speed (8% faster movement, +1.5 speed per level). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.8 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.4 PER

name: [Assassin]
description: A shadow striking without warning. You move in complete silence (-40% noise, +30% hearing). You are nearly invisible (+50% stealth). Your movements blur with supernatural speed (8% faster movement, +1.5 speed per level). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.75 DEX, +0.35 INT, +0.3 PER

name: [Ranger]
description: Master sharpshooter with perfect aim. You see clearly in darkness (night vision 20 tiles). You require less water (half at level 10, none at 20). Your movements are unnaturally fast (5% faster movement, +1 speed per level). Per level: +0.15 STR, +0.45 DEX, +0.1 INT, +0.8 PER

name: [Craftsman]
description: Master of all trades. Your skilled hands work with incredible precision (+6 to crafting skills, +2 shooting/cooking, 2x crafting/construction speed). Per level: +0.2 STR, +0.3 DEX, +0.4 INT, +0.6 PER

name: [Spellsword]
description: You weave arcane power into your blade. Your strikes are infused with magic. Moderate mana reserves (+800 mana, +15% mana regen). Per level: +0.55 STR, +0.35 DEX, +0.45 INT, +0.25 PER

name: [Battlemage]
description: A spellcaster trained for battle. Your magic shields your body (+3 armor). Large mana reserves (+1500 mana, +30% mana regen). Per level: +0.35 STR, +0.25 DEX, +0.75 INT, +0.25 PER

name: [Arcane Trickster]
description: You combine magic with agility. Your movement bends space itself (10% faster movement). Moderate mana reserves (+1000 mana, +20% mana regen). Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.7 DEX, +0.55 INT, +0.25 PER

name: [Duelist]
description: A master of elegant combat. Your strikes are precise and lightning fast (20% faster attacks). Your movements are swift (10% faster movement). Per level: +0.25 STR, +0.8 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.4 PER

name: [Pathfinder]
description: A master explorer of the wilds. Your endurance is exceptional and you need far less water. Your movements are swift (30% faster movement). Per level: +0.2 STR, +0.45 DEX, +0.15 INT, +0.8 PER

name: [Warlord]
description: A battlefield commander who inspires carnage. Massive physical presence and brutality. Per level: +1.00 STR, +0.60 DEX, +0.10 INT, +0.30 PER

name: [Blood Reaver]
description: A savage champion who converts wounds into fury. High offensive power and attack speed. Per level: +1.00 STR, +0.70 DEX, +0.10 INT, +0.20 PER

name: [Colossus]
description: A towering paragon of defense. Tremendous armor and endurance. Per level: +0.9 STR, +0.15 DEX, +0.15 INT, +0.75 PER

name: [Sentinel]
description: An immovable protector who controls the battlefield. High physical resist and countering power. Per level: +0.6 STR, +0.3 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.9 PER

name: [Spellblade]
description: Your blade sings with refined arcane energy. Balanced might and magics. Per level: +0.80 STR, +0.45 DEX, +0.60 INT, +0.25 PER

name: [Archmage]
description: Peerless arcane master. Vast mana pools and superior magical efficiency. Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.2 DEX, +1.4 INT, +0.3 PER

name: [Sage]
description: The consummate scholar: supreme understanding, perfect crafting, spellcraft mastery, and vast mana. All crafting skills 10, spellcraft +5, dodge +3, 3x crafting/construction speed, +2000 mana. Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.3 DEX, +1.1 INT, +0.5 PER

name: [War Magus]
description: A spellcaster who masters the fury of battle. Strong magical offense with martial aptitude. Per level: +0.6 STR, +0.4 DEX, +0.8 INT, +0.2 PER

name: [Spell Knight]
description: An armored caster who blends protective enchantments with blade work. Moderate mana and armor. Per level: +0.7 STR, +0.35 DEX, +0.75 INT, +0.2 PER

name: [Wind Dancer]
description: A whirlwind of motion. Exceptional speed and evasiveness. Per level: +0.15 STR, +1.2 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.45 PER

name: [Phantom]
description: An unseen hunter from the dark: stealth, lethal strikes and uncanny awareness. Per level: +0.1 STR, +1.1 DEX, +0.4 INT, +0.4 PER

name: [Death Stalker]
description: A predator perfected: silent, lethal and brutally efficient. Per level: +0.2 STR, +1.0 DEX, +0.4 INT, +0.4 PER

name: [Void Dancer]
description: A dangerous practitioner of shadow and arcana. Moves with impossible speed and strikes faster. Per level: +0.1 STR, +1.0 DEX, +0.7 INT, +0.2 PER

name: [Aether Strider]
description: A graceful spell-movement specialist: faster movement and strong mana regeneration. Per level: +0.1 STR, +0.9 DEX, +0.8 INT, +0.2 PER

name: [Blade Saint]
description: An enlightened duelist: blinding speed, superior dodging and near-perfect timing. Per level: +0.4 STR, +1.1 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.3 PER

name: [Hunter]
description: A consummate tracker and sniper fused with beast-lore. Superior perception and ranged lethality. Per level: +0.3 STR, +0.7 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.8 PER

name: [Artificer]
description: A master inventor: perfect crafting mastery and engineering prowess. All crafting skills 10, shooting +5, driving +5, 3x crafting speed, +3x construction speed. Per level: +0.3 STR, +0.4 DEX, +0.9 INT, +0.4 PER

name: [Trailblazer]
description: The ultimate pathfinder: unmatched speed across terrain and uncanny survival instincts. Per level: +0.2 STR, +1.0 DEX, +0.2 INT, +0.6 PER

name: [Bionic Symbiote]
description: Your cells integrate seamlessly with cybernetics. Your body naturally generates bionic power (regenerates 2 kJ per level every 5 minutes).

name: [Vital Essence]
description: Life energy flows through you. You are perpetually healthy and healing (increases health by 0.02 per level every 5 minutes).

name: [Purifying Blood]
description: Your blood purifies toxins and radiation. You naturally cleanse radiation from your body (removes 0.5 radiation per level every 5 minutes).

name: [Resistant Skin]
description: Your skin is unnaturally resistant to environmental hazards. You naturally resist corrosive and thermal damage (+4 acid armor, +4 heat armor).

name: [Lightweight Frame]
description: Your body is optimized for speed over strength. You move 25% faster but can't carry as much (25% less carry capacity).

name: [Strong Back]
description: You carry burdens that would crush others (+60% carry capacity), but your movement is 10% slower.

name: [Tireless]
description: Your stamina seems endless (+25% max stamina), but your base speed is 5% lower.

name: [Mana Font]
description: Mana flows through you like a river (+1250 mana, +10% mana regen, +10% mana multiplier), but your max stamina is 10% lower.

name: [Blink Step]
description: You move with supernatural quickness (25% faster movement), but your max stamina is 10% lower.

name: [Natural Healer]
description: Your body repairs itself rapidly (+30% HP regen while awake, +75% HP regen while resting), but your metabolism is 10% higher.

name: [Adaptive Biology]
description: Your body adapts to harsh conditions. You naturally resist extreme temperatures (-750, 750 bodytemp units).

name: [Glass Cannon]
description: Immense power, fragile form. You move with tremendous speed (+20% speed) but are more vulnerable (-5 physical armor).

name: [Juggernaut]
description: An unstoppable force. You are incredibly strong (+60% carry capacity, +6 physical armor) but move very slowly (15% slower movement, 5% slower speed).

name: [Arcane Battery]
description: You store immense magical energy. Your mana reserves are enormous (+5000 mana) but regenerate very slowly (50% slower mana regen).

name: [Iron Fists]
description: Your fists are hardened weapons. Your unarmed strikes deal devastating damage (+6 bash, +4 cut, +3 pierce damage).

name: [Efficient Metabolism]
description: Your body uses resources efficiently. You need 50% less food and get tired 50% slower.

name: [Combat Reflexes]
description: You react instantly to threats. Your reflexes grant superior evasion (+3 dodge bonus).

name: [Acrobat]
description: You land gracefully from any height. You take 95% less falling damage and gain +2 dodge bonus, but carry 10% less weight.

name: [Tireless Worker]
description: You never seem to tire. You get tired 50% slower and recover from fatigue 80% faster, but move 10% slower.

name: [Rapid Metabolism]
description: Your body processes energy rapidly. You regenerate stamina 100% faster but need 75% more food.

name: [Scentless]
description: You emit almost no scent. Enemies that track by smell have much harder time detecting you (90% reduced scent).

name: [Clotting Factor]
description: Your blood clots almost instantly. You are highly resistant to bleeding (1000 bleed resistance).

name: [Regenerator]
description: Your limbs mend at an incredible rate (100% faster limb mending), but your metabolism is 15% higher.

name: [Master Craftsman]
description: Your hands are skilled at creation. You craft 75% faster and build 50% faster, but your attacks are 10% slower.

name: [Pack Rat]
description: You know how to pack efficiently. Your worn containers hold 50% more items, but you move 5% slower while loaded.

name: [Creature Harvester]
description: You instinctively know how to harvest creatures. You can efficiently harvest materials with your bare hands (butchering quality 40).

name: [Vampiric]
description: You drain life essence from your foes. Heal for 0.5% of monster's max HP per level (minimum 1 HP) on kill.

name: [Sharpshooter]
description: Deadly accuracy with firearms. Your shots are more consistent (+4 rifle/pistol skill).

name: [Reinforced Skeleton]
description: Your bones are dense. You gain +6 physical armor, but become slightly heavier (-10% movement speed).

name: [Focused Mind]
description: Your mind achieves clarity. Major morale boost (+50).

name: [Sure Step]
description: You keep your footing in chaos. +2 dodge and 10% lower movement cost.

name: [Lightning Reflexes]
description: Your reflexes are sharp. +10% attack speed and +10% movement speed, but -10% carry capacity.

name: [Iron Metabolism]
description: Your body cleanses toxins (+0.1 rad purg/level), but you need 20% more food.

name: [Spell Resonance]
description: Magic suits you (+1200 mana, +10% mana regen, +2 spellcraft), but your max stamina is 10% lower.

name: [Unstoppable Force]
description: Pure melee power. +8 bash damage and attacks 10% faster.

name: [Battle Echo]
description: You fight through predictive rhythm. +2 dodge, +10% movement speed, +10% attack speed, but you take +4 encumbrance on all body parts.

name: [Rapid Healer]
description: Your body regenerates wounds quickly but you forget how to do first aid (-5 first aid skill, +75% resting healing, +50% awake healing).

name: [Perfect Balance]
description: You move with grace. +3 dodge. 5% movement cost reduction.

name: [Predator]
description: You hunt efficiently. +1 survival, +2 melee, 10% faster attacks.

name: [Overload]
description: You push limits: 30% faster movement and attacks, but fatigue builds 30% faster and max stamina is 10% lower.

name: [Apex Predator]
description: Perfect hunter. +3 melee, +3 dodge, 8% faster attacks, morale +10.

name: [Blood Echo]
description: You echo the life of your foes. +2 melee, +1 survival, and +40% resting healing, but your metabolism is 10% higher.

name: [Unbreakable]
description: Your body is resilient. +4 physical armor, +100% limb mending, but -15% movement.

name: [Skirmish Assassin]
description: Lethal hit-and-run combatant. +20% stealth, +2 dodge, +2 melee, 10% faster movement and attacks. However, you are more vulnerable in direct combat (-2 physical armor).

name: [Essence Drain]
description: You drain foes' essence. Heal 0.3% HP on kill.

name: [Perfect Crafter]
description: Your crafting is flawless. +2 fabrication/electronics/mechanics, +200% crafting speed, +200% construction speed, but -5 dodge.

name: [Godslayer]
description: You are a slayer of the mighty. +4 dodge and 30% faster attacks, but your movement is 15% slower.

name: [World Walker]
description: You traverse rough terrain with efficiency. +1 survival, +4 dodge, and 50% faster movement, but max stamina is 15% lower.

name: [Immortal]
description: You achieve near-immortal resilience (+100% resting healing, +100% awake healing), but your movement is 10% slower.

name: [Engineer]
description: Master of mechanisms. +1 fabrication/electronics/mechanics and +150% crafting speed, but -3 dodge.

name: [Tactical Mind]
description: You calculate every move. +4 melee, +3 dodge, but you lose joy in life. -20 morale.

name: [Primal Fury]
description: Raw rage fuels you. +2 melee, +2 unarmed, 15% faster attacks, -10% armor.

name: [Ghost Step]
description: You drift like a phantom. +20% stealth, +2 dodge, 15% faster movement.
